detail.description: Pedro Ramírez doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Matt Vierling. Ian Happ to 3rd.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to center fielder James Outman.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Luke Keaschall. Nico Hoerner scores.
Pedro Ramírez hits a ground-rule double (5) on a fly ball down the left-field line.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin. Michael Busch scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd.
Pedro Ramírez hits a ground-rule double (4) on a fly ball down the left-field line. Ian Happ scores. Nico Hoerner to 3rd.
Pedro Ramírez triples (1) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a line drive to left fielder Yohendrick Piñango, deflected by shortstop Andrés Giménez. Justin Dean scores.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Troy Johnston. Seiya Suzuki scores. Ian Happ to 3rd. Nico Hoerner to 2nd.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd.
Pedro Ramírez doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith, deflected by center fielder Jake Meyers. Moisés Ballesteros scores. Carson Kelly to 3rd.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a pop up to right fielder Carson Benge. Nico Hoerner scores. Carson Kelly to 3rd.
Pedro Ramírez doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Brett Baty.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Brett Baty. Nico Hoerner scores. Carson Kelly to 2nd.
Pedro Ramírez homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Pedro Ramírez doubles (2) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Drew Gilbert.
Pedro Ramírez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Bryan Reynolds.
